post.description:
Create an account + auto-login (cookies + body CSRF).

First user signed up becomes ``is_super_user=true`` when
``allow_first_user_as_admin`` is enabled. See ADR-016 §8.4 for
operational guidance on disabling this in production.
Verify credentials, mint cookies, return user + CSRF body.

Revoke the active refresh row + clear cookies.

CSRF-checked so a malicious site can't log the user out via a
cross-origin POST.
Rotate the refresh cookie. No CSRF — cookie alone authorizes.

get.description:
Return the authenticated user.

Re-fetches the row so fields like ``last_login_at`` (not carried
on ``CurrentUser``) reflect persisted state.

schema.title: Response List Deployment Candidates Api Agent Api Deployment Candidates Get
Response List Deployments Api Agent Api Deployments Get
Response List Api Keys Api Agent Api Keys Get
Response Public Health V1 Health Get
Response List Public Agents V1 Agents Get
Response List Agents Api Agents Get
Response List Agent Summaries Api Agents Summary Get

get.description:
Return the available middleware catalog.

deepagents가 자동 추가하는 빌트인 미들웨어는 제외한다.

schema.title: Response List Middlewares Api Middlewares Get
Response List Conversation Artifacts Api Conversations  Conversation Id  Artifacts Get
Response List Recent Artifacts Api Artifacts Recent Get

post.description: 빌드 세션을 시작한다.

빌드를 확인하고 실제 에이전트를 생성한다.

멱등성 보장:
- COMPLETED + agent_id 있음 → 기존 Agent 반환 (중복 생성 방지)
- CONFIRMING → 409 (다른 요청이 처리 중)
- PREVIEW → CONFIRMING 원자적 전환 후 Agent 생성

Builder v3 — 사용자 메시지를 전송하고 SSE 스트림을 받는다.

첫 메시지: 그래프를 처음부터 실행 (Phase 1부터).
후속 메시지: 그래프가 진행 중이면 messages만 추가.
Builder v3 — interrupt 응답을 전달하고 그래프를 재개한다.

get.description:
Phase 6에서 생성한 임시 이미지 미리보기를 서빙한다.

세션 소유자만 접근 가능 (다른 사용자의 builder 이미지 접근 차단).

post.description: Assistant에게 메시지를 보내고 SSE 스트리밍으로 응답받는다.

schema.title: Response List Conversations Api Agents  Agent Id  Conversations Get
Response List Traces Api Conversations  Conversation Id  Traces Get
Response List Credential Types Api Credential Types Get
Response List Credentials Api Credentials Get

post.description:
List models reachable through this Credential.

Per-provider dispatch lives in ``app.services.model_discovery``. Failures
bubble up as a 502 with the provider message — credential ``test`` is the
canonical 'is this key valid' surface, not this endpoint.

schema.title: Response Discover Models Api Credentials  Credential Id  Discover Models Post
Response List Audit Logs Api Credentials  Credential Id  Audit Logs Get

post.description:
Build an authorization URL and persist the in-flight state token.

The credential's ``data`` must already contain ``client_id`` and either
``authorization_url`` or be a definition that infers one (the API consumer
is responsible for filling these in before starting the flow).

get.description: Exchange ``code`` for tokens via the definition's ``pre_authentication``.

schema.title: Response Oauth2 Callback Api Oauth2 Credential Callback Get

get.description: List all operator-managed system credentials. Super_user only.

schema.title: Response List System Credentials Api System Credentials Get
Response List Model Health Api Health Models Get
Response List Mcp Health Api Health Mcp Servers Get
Response Get History Api Health History Get

post.description:
Run a probe immediately and return the resulting history row.

For model targets, ``credential_id`` is optional — when omitted, the
model's ``default_credential_id`` is used. This keeps the row [Check]
button on the models page calling the credential the user picked at
Add-model time, instead of a provider-matched fallback.

schema.title: Response List Items Api Marketplace Items Get
Response List Versions Api Marketplace Items  Item Id  Versions Get

post.description:
Install a marketplace item into the user's account.

Returns ``201`` for a fresh install AND for a ``reuse_or_update``
that reused an existing installation — the client uses the
``installation_id`` regardless of whether it was just created.

First publish — creates a new marketplace item.

Use ``POST /items/{id}/versions/from-skill/{skill_id}`` to add a
follow-up version on an existing item; this endpoint always creates
a fresh item (``body.item_id`` is ignored on this route).

Add a new version to an existing item.

The publish service requires the full ``PublishSkillIn`` shape so we
synthesize one from the existing item's current metadata + the
caller's ``release_notes``. Visibility / ACL stay at the item's
current settings — use ``PATCH`` for metadata edits.

Disable 의 inverse — ``status: disabled → published`` 로 복원. ACL
/ visibility / is_listed 는 그대로 유지된다 — owner 가 다시 노출하려면
별도 흐름(visibility 변경 + super_user listing approve) 을 거친다.

Spec §10.5 — super_user가 public item의 ``is_listed``를 토글한다.

카탈로그 default filter는 ``is_listed=True``인 public 항목만 검색
결과에 노출한다 (PRD §11.7). 부적절한 public 항목을 unlist하거나
pending moderation에서 approve할 때 사용한다. CSRF 검증 필수.

Spec §10.4 — operator inspection endpoint.

**Does not execute** the sync — that's an out-of-band CLI run
(``uv run python -m app.scripts.sync_k_skill``). This endpoint just
surfaces the current population: how many k-skill items exist,
their statuses, and the most recent ``updated_at`` so the dashboard
can tell whether a fresh CLI run is overdue.

schema.title: Response Admin K Skill Sync Status Api Marketplace Admin K Skill Sync Post
Response List Memories Api Memories Get
Response List Servers Api Mcp Servers Get

post.description:
Create a server from a curated catalog entry.

Pre-fills transport / URL / stdio command / env_var template from the
registry, then sticks the user-supplied name and (optional)
``credential_id`` on top. Unknown ``registry_key`` is a 400 — the
catalog is the source of truth.

Connect to an MCP server without persisting it.

Powers the wizard's "preview before commit" flow — returns the same
tool descriptors the regular discover path would import, so the UI can
render results identically. No DB writes happen here, so a user who
abandons the wizard leaves no orphan rows.

get.description:
All MCP tools across the user's servers — powers the unified Tools
picker (Tools tab → MCP source) so the user can bind individual tools
to an agent without first navigating to each server detail page.

schema.title: Response List All User Mcp Tools Api Mcp Servers All Tools Get

post.description:
Bulk import MCP server definitions.

Accepts the Claude Desktop ``{mcpServers: {<name>: {...}}}`` shape. Each
entry can use ``command`` / ``args`` / ``env`` (stdio, inferred when
``transport`` is omitted) or ``transport`` + ``url`` + ``headers``
(Moldy network extension). ``credential_id`` is honoured when present
and owned by the caller.

With ``overwrite=false`` (default) duplicates are skipped; with
``overwrite=true`` an existing same-named server is updated in place
(its tool links are preserved because the row keeps its id).

get.description:
Dump every server owned by the caller in import-compatible shape.

Secrets are never inlined — ``env`` / ``headers`` keep their pre-resolution
template strings, and ``credential_id`` is exported as a bare reference.
Return every entry from the curated MCP server catalog.

schema.title: Response List Registry Entries Api Mcp Server Types Get

parameters.name: include_hidden

schema.description: Super-user only — include rows where ``is_visible=False``. Drives the operator-facing ``/models`` admin page.
schema.title: Include Hidden

parameters.description: Super-user only — include rows where ``is_visible=False``. Drives the operator-facing ``/models`` admin page.

post.description:
Register a new model row.

Catalog mutations are operator-only — the model table is a global
resource and end users should not be able to inject pricing or rebind
providers. 409 on duplicate ``(provider, model_name)`` so the frontend
can collapse "already registered" into a friendly toast.

Probe a registered ``Model`` row using a Credential.

Tiered credential lookup: explicit ``credential_id`` query param > model's
``default_credential_id``. 422 if neither resolves (user has no usable
credential for this model).

parameters.name: credential_id

schema.description: Stored credential whose decrypted payload supplies the API key. If omitted, falls back to the model's default_credential_id (captured at Add-model time).
schema.title: Credential Id

parameters.description: Stored credential whose decrypted payload supplies the API key. If omitted, falls back to the model's default_credential_id (captured at Add-model time).

post.description:
Probe an unregistered ``provider:model_name`` combo (Custom ID flow).

Same semantics as ``test_registered_model`` minus the catalog lookup — the
request body carries the model identity inline so the user can validate a
pasted-in ID before committing it to the table.

get.description: Return the active share link, or ``None`` when the conversation is private.

schema.title: Response Get Active Share Api Conversations  Conversation Id  Share Get

post.description: Make the conversation public. Returns the existing token if already shared.

delete.description: Revoke any active share link for the conversation. Idempotent.

get.description:
Resolve a share token to a read-only conversation snapshot.

The full message list is included so the public page renders in a single
round-trip (vs. fetching share + messages separately). For very long
conversations a future revision may paginate.

Public messages endpoint — useful when the consumer wants the same
branch metadata shape as the authenticated ``/api/conversations/.../messages``
endpoint without owning the conversation.

Response List Templates Api Templates Get

post.description:
Upload a ``.skill`` package (ZIP with SKILL.md frontmatter).

ADR-017 Slice C — secret_scan runs after the extracted directory
lands on disk. If secrets are found, the skill row + on-disk dir
are rolled back before the response so a leak doesn't sit around
waiting to be linked.

schema.title: Response List Skill Files Api Skills  Skill Id  Files Get

post.description: Upload a binary or text file (multipart) into a package skill.

put.description: Create or overwrite a single file in a package skill.

delete.description: Delete a file (or directory) from a package skill. SKILL.md is protected.

get.description:
Public requirement list — empty when the skill has no requirements.

No 404 on "empty" — only on "doesn't exist / not yours". Lets the
UI render an empty state without an extra error path.

put.description:
Upsert binding for ``(skill, user, requirement_key)``.

Validation goes through ``credential_requirements.validate_binding`` —
rejects cross-user credentials (404), system credentials (400),
definition_key mismatches (400), and unknown requirement keys (400).

get.description: All role slots (text_primary / text_fallback / image). Super_user only.

get.description: Serve the stored file inline — used by the frontend preview cards.

post.description: Create or replace the current user's rating for ``message_id``.

delete.description: Remove the current user's rating for ``message_id`` (toggle off).

get.description:
Return all of the current user's ratings inside a conversation.

Used by the frontend to hydrate the active rating state when re-opening
a conversation, so the up/down buttons start in the correct mode.

get.description:
Daily spend aggregates for the current user.

Tenancy is enforced inside :func:`usage_aggregate.get_daily_spend` — the
``user`` axis filters on ``DailySpendUser.user_id`` directly while
``agent`` / ``model`` join through ``Agent.user_id`` so a user only ever
sees rows they contributed to.

AgentBrief.title: AgentBrief
AgentBrief.description: 가벼운 에이전트 카드용 표현 (서브에이전트 목록 등).

agent_description.title: Agent Description
agent_description.description: 에이전트의 역할과 기능에 대한 상세 설명 (3~5문장)

identity_mode.title: Identity Mode
identity_mode.description: credential 사용 주체: per_user 또는 fixed

AgentSummaryResponse.title: AgentSummaryResponse
AgentSummaryResponse.description: Dashboard/sidebar card payload without eager-loaded nested resources.

session_id.title: Session Id
session_id.description: 클라이언트가 생성한 세션 ID (crypto.randomUUID). 같은 session_id는 같은 대화를 유지, 없으면 agent_id 기반 기본값 사용.

AuthResponse.title: AuthResponse
AuthResponse.description:
Body returned by register / login / refresh.

Cookies carry the access + refresh JWTs (HttpOnly). The CSRF token is
*also* shipped in a non-HttpOnly cookie (``moldy_csrf``) so the SPA
can read it via ``document.cookie``; we additionally return it in the
body for clients that prefer to keep it in JS memory.

rel_path.title: Rel Path
rel_path.description: Relative path inside the skill, eg 'scripts/run.py'

BuilderResumeRequest.title: BuilderResumeRequest
BuilderResumeRequest.description:
Builder v3 — interrupt 응답 요청. 표준 HiTL wire (ADR-012).

표준 ``decisions: list[Decision]`` 만 수용한다 (clean break — extra
field 는 422). router 가 ``decisions_to_builder_response`` 어댑터로
builder graph 가 기대하는 native shape (dict | str) 로 변환한다.

Decision → builder native 변환:
- ``approve``                   → ``{"approved": True}``      (approval phase)
- ``reject(message)``           → ``{"approved": False, "revision_message": ...}``
- ``respond(message)``          → ``"..."``                    (ask_user / image_*)
- ``edit(edited_action)``       → ``{"approved": True}``       (builder 는 edit 미사용)

CredentialRequirementIn.title: CredentialRequirementIn
CredentialRequirementIn.description: Publish/k-skill import input. Adds env_map projection.

Decision.title: Decision
Decision.description:
단일 tool_call에 대한 인간 결정.

LangChain ``HumanInTheLoopMiddleware``의 ``HITLResponse.decisions[i]``와
동일 shape (1:1 매칭). router에서 검증한 뒤 ``model_dump(exclude_none=True)``
로 dict 직렬화하여 ``Command(resume={"decisions": [dict, ...]})``로 송신한다
(LangChain 미들웨어는 ``NotRequired`` TypedDict를 받음).

- ``approve``: 추가 필드 없음.
- ``edit``: ``edited_action={"name": str, "args": dict}`` 필수.
- ``reject``: ``message`` 선택 (없으면 미들웨어가 기본 메시지 생성).
- ``respond``: ``message`` 필수 (synthetic ToolMessage content).

DraftAgentConfig.title: DraftAgentConfig
DraftAgentConfig.description: 빌드 파이프라인 최종 산출물 — 사용자 확인용 에이전트 설정 프리뷰.

EditMessageRequest.title: EditMessageRequest
EditMessageRequest.description:
Edit a previous user message and re-run from there.

``message_id`` identifies the user message being replaced. Backend rewinds
to the checkpoint just before it and forks a new branch with the edited
content.

HealthSummaryEntry.title: HealthSummaryEntry
HealthSummaryEntry.description: Latest status snapshot for a single target.

MarketplaceInstallationSummary.title: MarketplaceInstallationSummary
MarketplaceInstallationSummary.description: Is the current user installed on this item?

MarketplaceItemOut.title: MarketplaceItemOut
MarketplaceItemOut.description:
Catalog row + detail response (Spec §10.8).

Read-only side. Service layer constructs this via ``derive_*`` helpers
so the ORM/Pydantic mapping never leaks privileged columns
(moderation_status, ACL membership).

MarketplaceItemPatchIn.title: MarketplaceItemPatchIn
MarketplaceItemPatchIn.description:
Metadata-only PATCH (no version mutation).

``visibility`` 는 새 version 을 만들지 않는 경량 전환 — public ↔ private
↔ unlisted 토글 (예: 사용자가 잘못 public 으로 publish 한 것을 private
으로 되돌리는 경로). ``restricted`` 로 바꾸려면 ACL endpoint 도 함께
호출해야 한다 (ACL 비어 있으면 ``marketplace_acl_required``).

MarketplaceItemsPage.title: MarketplaceItemsPage
MarketplaceItemsPage.description: Offset page envelope for catalog screens that must not load all rows.

McpExportEntry.title: McpExportEntry
McpExportEntry.description:
A single entry in the export payload — credentials are referenced
by id only (the secret payload itself is never exported).

McpImportEntry.title: McpImportEntry
McpImportEntry.description:
One entry inside ``mcpServers`` map.

Matches Claude Desktop's ``claude_desktop_config.json`` shape — when
``transport`` is omitted, ``stdio`` is inferred from ``command`` /
``args``. ``url`` + ``transport`` (``sse`` / ``streamable_http``) is the
Moldy extension for network-bound servers; ``credential_id`` lets the
caller bind a previously stored credential by id.

McpProbeRequest.title: McpProbeRequest
McpProbeRequest.description:
Body for ``POST /api/mcp-servers/probe``.

Connects to an MCP server and lists its tools without persisting anything.
Used by the wizard's Step 3 to preview tools before the user commits with
[Add]. Either provide manual fields or a ``registry_key`` to hydrate from
the curated catalog.

McpServerCreateFromRegistry.title: McpServerCreateFromRegistry
McpServerCreateFromRegistry.description:
Body for ``POST /api/mcp-servers/from-registry``.

Hydrates a :class:`McpServer` row from a registry entry. ``name`` lets
the user override the display name (defaults to the registry's
``display_name`` when omitted on the client side); ``credential_id`` is
optional — users can register the server first and bind a credential
later via PATCH.

McpToolBrief.title: McpToolBrief
McpToolBrief.description: Per-server MCP tool reference for agent responses.

McpToolWithServerResponse.title: McpToolWithServerResponse
McpToolWithServerResponse.description:
Flat row used by the unified agent Tools picker — embeds the parent
server's id/name so the UI can group / label without an extra fetch.

MessageAttachmentBrief.title: MessageAttachmentBrief
MessageAttachmentBrief.description:
Inline attachment metadata exposed alongside ``MessageResponse``.

The frontend renders thumbnails / download cards from this. Only the
fields needed for preview are surfaced — full row goes through
``/api/uploads/{id}``.

MessageAttachmentRef.title: MessageAttachmentRef
MessageAttachmentRef.description:
Frontend → backend reference: link an existing upload row to a message.

Only the upload id is needed; the row already carries the URL/mime/size
and is reused when echoed back via ``MessageResponse.attachments``.

MessageFeedbackBrief.title: MessageFeedbackBrief
MessageFeedbackBrief.description: Current user's feedback on a message (None if unrated).

MessagesEnvelope.title: MessagesEnvelope
MessagesEnvelope.description:
Wrapped message-list response.

The plain ``list[MessageResponse]`` shape was used pre-M-CHAT1b. We now
wrap it with branch metadata so the frontend can build a tree view; the
list field name stays ``messages`` to match assistant-ui's external store
adapter expectations.

MiddlewareRecommendation.title: MiddlewareRecommendation
MiddlewareRecommendation.description: 미들웨어 추천 서브에이전트의 개별 추천 항목.

ModelCreate.title: ModelCreate
ModelCreate.description:
Payload for ``POST /api/models`` — register a discovered or custom model.

Pricing fields are optional because catalog-less custom IDs are valid
(``source='manual'``); the user can fill them in via PATCH later.

model_name.title: Model Name
model_name.description: Wire model id sent to the provider.

base_url.title: Base Url
base_url.description: Override; falls back to provider default.

credential_id.title: Credential Id
credential_id.description: Stored Credential whose decrypted payload supplies the API key.

ModelTestPreviewRequest.title: ModelTestPreviewRequest
ModelTestPreviewRequest.description:
Body for ``POST /api/models/test-preview``.

The model row may not exist yet (Custom ID / Discover preview), so the
caller passes the wire shape inline plus a stored Credential reference.

ModelUpdate.title: ModelUpdate
ModelUpdate.description: Patch a model — every field is optional. Pricing/meta override-friendly.

RefreshResponse.title: RefreshResponse
RefreshResponse.description: Body for /api/auth/refresh — minimal since cookies do the heavy lifting.

RegenerateMessageRequest.title: RegenerateMessageRequest
RegenerateMessageRequest.description:
Regenerate an assistant message in place.

If ``message_id`` is omitted the backend regenerates the latest assistant
turn. Otherwise the named assistant message is replaced (its parent user
message is replayed).

ResourceOriginSummaryOut.title: ResourceOriginSummaryOut
ResourceOriginSummaryOut.description: Where the current user's installed resource came from.

ResourcePublicationSummaryOut.title: ResourcePublicationSummaryOut
ResourcePublicationSummaryOut.description: Whether/how the current user has published this resource.

ResumeRequest.title: ResumeRequest
ResumeRequest.description: HiTL resume 요청. LangChain ``HITLResponse`` 호환 표준 wire.

ShareLinkResponse.title: ShareLinkResponse
ShareLinkResponse.description: Owner-facing share link metadata (returned on create / fetch).

SharedAgentBrief.title: SharedAgentBrief
SharedAgentBrief.description: Minimal agent identity for the public share header.

SharedConversationView.title: SharedConversationView
SharedConversationView.description:
Public read-only conversation snapshot returned by ``/api/shares/{token}``.

``traces`` (W6): turn별 SSE event 시퀀스. 공개 페이지에서 도구/Skill 칩
렌더에 사용된다. 빈 배열이면 trace가 없는 (W5 머지 이전에 만들어진) 대화.

SkillCreate.title: SkillCreate
SkillCreate.description:
Create a text-kind skill via JSON.

Package-kind skills are uploaded as multipart files to
``POST /api/skills/upload``.

SkillCredentialRequirementOut.title: SkillCredentialRequirementOut
SkillCredentialRequirementOut.description:
One ``credential_requirements`` entry stored on the skill row.

Mirror of ``app.marketplace.schemas.CredentialRequirementOut`` but kept
here so ``app.schemas.skill`` does not import from ``app.marketplace``
(avoid a cycle when the marketplace schemas evolve).

content.title: Content
content.description: UTF-8 text body. Binary files use upload endpoint.

SkillFileUpdate.title: SkillFileUpdate
SkillFileUpdate.description: PUT body for setting a single file inside a package skill.

SkillMetadataUpdate.title: SkillMetadataUpdate
SkillMetadataUpdate.description: Patch metadata fields only — content edits use a separate endpoint.

SwitchBranchRequest.title: SwitchBranchRequest
SwitchBranchRequest.description:
Flip the active branch by checkpoint id.

The backend can't truly "switch heads" in LangGraph (re-invocation is the
only way to advance the timeline) so this endpoint just records the
user's choice; subsequent edits will fork from this checkpoint.

SystemLlmSettingOut.title: SystemLlmSettingOut
SystemLlmSettingOut.description: A single role slot's resolved configuration for the operator screen.

SystemLlmSettingUpdate.title: SystemLlmSettingUpdate
SystemLlmSettingUpdate.description: PUT body — selects (or clears) the credential/model for a role.

TokenUsageBreakdown.title: TokenUsageBreakdown
TokenUsageBreakdown.description:
W7 — 메시지별 4종 토큰 분해 (LangChain ``usage_metadata`` 평탄화).

LangChain은 ``input_token_details``로 cache_creation/cache_read를 분리해
전달한다. 클라이언트 hover 팝오버가 직접 참조하므로 평탄한 4 필드 + 비용
형태로 직렬화. 모든 필드 0이면 응답에서 ``null`` 자리를 반환하고 클라이언트는
렌더 자체를 건너뛴다.

ToolRecommendation.title: ToolRecommendation
ToolRecommendation.description:
도구 추천 서브에이전트의 개별 추천 항목.

``kind`` 는 매칭 대상 카테고리를 명시한다 — phase8 confirm 단계가 종류별
로 다른 테이블/링크를 사용하므로 (Tool / McpTool / Skill). 기본값은
``"tool"`` 로 backward compat 보장 — 기존 LLM 응답이 kind 를 누락해도
Tool 매칭 경로로 흘러간다.

TraceEvent.title: TraceEvent
TraceEvent.description:
Single SSE event captured during one assistant turn.

Mirrors the shape ``stream_agent_response`` accumulates in ``trace_sink``:
``id`` is the SSE id ``"<msg_id>-<seq>"``, ``event`` is the event name
(``message_start`` / ``content_delta`` / ``tool_call_start`` / ...), and
``data`` is the original JSON payload.

TurnTraceResponse.title: TurnTraceResponse
TurnTraceResponse.description:
One assistant turn's trace — events array + bookkeeping.

Used by W6 (shared page chip rendering) and the future W3-out resume
endpoint to read the full event sequence.

``linked_message_ids``: 이 turn에 노출된 assistant 메시지의 parsed UUID
(``MessageResponse.id``와 동일 형식). 빈 배열/None이면 frontend는
chronological turn 순서로 폴백.

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description:
User projection returned by auth endpoints + /me.

Mirrors ``CurrentUser`` plus a few read-only audit fields. Excludes
``hashed_password`` and any reset/verify tokens — those never cross
the API boundary.
